_meta.source: Research agent (family/kids calendars + family/nature/club orgs), each URL live-fetched and verified to carry dated upcoming events in STATIC HTML. JS-only sources (Schaubude, Kindaling, DAV Berlin widget, Museum für Naturkunde) and blocked ones (Musenkuss 401) were excluded. familienportal.berlin.de handled separately (cms=familienportal paginated adapter). umweltkalender-berlin.de deferred — one 352k-char page needs its own adapter.

proposed.name: GRIPS Theater — Spielplan
proposed.notes: Berlin youth/children's theatre, ~200+ dated shows with age tags, static HTML cards.

proposed.name: Theater o.N. — Programm
proposed.notes: Prenzlauer Berg family theatre, ages 2+, ~12-15 dated shows, static HTML.

proposed.name: SJD Die Falken Berlin — Termine
proposed.notes: Kinderfreunde-equivalent (SJD). Listing page, NOT /feed (that is a blog feed w/o event dates). ~12-15 dated events.

proposed.name: NABU Berlin — Termine
proposed.notes: Nature-conservation events incl. NAJU children's groups, ~14 dated, static HTML table.

proposed.name: Naturpark Barnim — Termine
proposed.notes: Naturpark on Berlin's fringe; ranger tours, pony rides, kids escape games. ~12 dated.

proposed.name: Ökowerk Berlin (Grunewald) — Veranstaltungsprogramm
proposed.notes: Grunewald nature centre; children's theatre/storytelling, Kinder/Familien tags. ~12 dated.
